text:
Satya Keerthi Dara 
satyakeerthidara7@gmail.com | 940-277-9720 | LinkedIn 
 
SUMMARY 
• Data & AI Engineer with 1.5+ years building analytics pipelines, backend APIs, and automation systems using Python, SQL, 
and Java.  
• Built end-to-end user activity analytics system, from event tracking to dashboard reporting, improving data visibility and 
decision speed.  
• Experienced in LLM-based systems including RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, and workflow automation tools. 
• Strong focus on backend integration, data pipelines, and scalable AI-driven applications.  
SKILLS 
Languages: Python, Java, SQL, JavaScript 
AI & ML: Machine Learning, Generative AI, Prompt Engineering, Model Evaluation 
LLM Systems: LangChain, RAG, Vector Databases, OpenAI APIs 
Data Engineering: ETL Pipelines, Data Processing, Data Validation 
Backend: Spring Boot, REST APIs, System Integration 
Tools: Git, GitHub, Excel 
WORK EXPERIENCE 
Software Engineer 
SAK Informatics                 Feb 2022 – Nov 2023 
Technologies: Python, SQL, FastAPI, HTML, CSS, APIs 
• Developed a user activity analytics platform using Java (Spring Boot) and REST APIs to track application events and 
generate structured data for dashboards.  
• Designed and built data pipelines to process user events such as page views and feature interactions, enabling real-time 
analytics.  
• Integrated backend APIs with analytics dashboards, improving reporting speed and system monitoring efficiency.  
• Built automation workflows using Python to clean, validate, and transform event data for consistent reporting.  
• Optimized API performance and database queries, improving response time and data accuracy.  
• Maintained version control and documentation using GitHub to support team collaboration and deployment.  
• Debugged end-to-end data flow issues across APIs, pipelines, and dashboards to ensure system reliability. 
Software Engineer 
Cisco                    Aug 2021 – Dec 2021 
Technologies: Python, SQL, APIs, Linux 
• Developed frontend analytics dashboards using HTML5 to visualize user interaction and feature usage data.  
• Implemented event tracking mechanisms to capture application usage data for analysis.  
• Built Python scripts to validate analytics datasets and improve reporting accuracy.  
• Supported integration between frontend dashboards and backend analytics systems.  
• Used GitHub for version control and collaboration across development teams.  
• Assisted in debugging data inconsistencies in analytics pipelines and dashboards. 
EDUCATION 
Master of Science in Computer Science              Jan 2024 – Dec 2025 
Southeast Missouri State University – Cape Girardeau, Missouri 
Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science           Aug 2018 – May 2022 
Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University – Hyderabad, India 
ACADEMIC PROJECTS 
AI Job Matching & Resume Intelligence System 
• Built an AI-powered system that analyzes resumes and matches them with job descriptions using NLP and LLM-based 
similarity scoring.  
• Designed ETL pipelines to process job data and resume inputs, storing structured data in SQLite for querying and analysis.  
• Implemented RAG-based pipeline using LangChain to extract skills, experience, and match scores from resumes.  
• Developed REST APIs to serve job recommendations and match insights for frontend dashboards.  
• Built Power BI dashboard to visualize job match score, skill gaps, and application tracking metrics. 
AI Workflow Automation Assistant 
• Built an AI automation tool using LLM APIs to process text inputs and generate structured outputs such as summaries and 
reports. 
• Designed pipeline to handle input processing, API calls, and output formatting for automation workflows.  
• Integrated REST APIs and Python scripts to connect data sources and execute automated tasks.  
• Improved efficiency by reducing manual effort in document processing and reporting tasks.  
• Maintained version control and documentation using GitHub.
